series_metadata.series_title: Education Management File (formerly Academic and Vocational Records)
series_metadata.series_description: Record of inmate participation in educational programming including Academics, Career-Technical, Post Secondary and Appreticeship. Includes the transcript of all such activities. Also inlcudes education counseling information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain records at institution where incarcerated. Maintain permanently off-site transcript, high school information, and career/technical completion documentation., Paper: Shred
